title: Create: Lapis Lazuli Recipe
description: Create Add-on That Adds Lapis Lazuli Recipe Allowing Player To Automate It. Crush Limestone Using Crushing Wheel To Get 75% Lapis Lazuli
body: ## 🌱 About Create: Lapis Lazuli Recipe is an add-on for the Create mod, available as both a mod and a datapack. It introduces a new recipe for Lapis Lazuli, allowing players to renewably get Lapis Lazuli. ## 📋 Recipe |Result|Ingredients|Type| |---|---|---| |Lapis Lazuli(75% chance), 1 Bone meal, bone meal(50% chance)|Limestone|Crushing| 1. Tip: Use [Just Enough Items(JEI)](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei) To View The Recipe In-Game 2. Tip: Limestone can be generated using stone generator, but replace water with honey ![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/84ed41ba1cb4ccee7c60bc6e5dd9ef321f3f8b70.png) ## 🧩 Installation Guide **How to Install the Mod (.jar)** 1. Download the Mod: Get the .jar file. 2. Drop the File: Drag the downloaded .jar file into the mods folder. **How to Install the Datapack (.zip)** 1. Download: Get the .zip file for the Datapack version. 2. Open Your World Folder: 3. Install: Open the datapacks folder and drag the downloaded .zip file inside. ## ⚙️ Supported Version |Version|Loader|Support| |---|---|---| |1.21.1|NeoForge|✅| |1.20.1|Forge/Neoforge|✅| |1.20.1|Fabric|✅| ## 📦 Other Recipes For Create # 👀 Play with friends Want to run a flawless modded server? Check out Godlike Host! Setting up a server through them is the absolute best way to support us right now.
